name: Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese and sugar; beat well.
3. Gradually blend in the cocoa, scraping the sides of the bowl and beaters frequently.
4. Add eggs and vanilla extract; blend until well combined.
5. Blend in the chilled whipping cream.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the center is set upon cooling.
8. Allow the pie to cool to room temperature.
9. Cover tightly and chill for several hours or overnight.
10. Garnish with cherry pie filling.
11. Serve 6 to 8 portions.
